objective: 实现 cw 1.0 v5 wave 层（ExecutionUnit）完整功能：core 领域模型 + rules 状态机/gates/freeze/replan + store 持久化 + handlers 11个action编排 + evidence跨阶段 + dispatch + 测试。src/v1/ 隔离层，不参考 engine/。

changes.description: PlanningStatus(8状态)/ExecutionStatus(10状态)联合类型 + StatusChange/AbandonedRef 接口
Plan/Split/WorkUnitItem基类 + WavePlan(+4字段)/WaveTestCase/WaveTask/WaveFile/WaveContract
Evidence基类/WaveEvidence/TestRunResult/ArtifactRef/ChildDeliveryRecord(预留Planning类型)
DesignReviewJudgment+WaveDesignReviewLayerSpecific/TestJudgment/ExecReviewJudgment+ExecReviewLayerSpecific/RetrospectData/FollowupAction
Clarification(extends WorkUnitItem)/Decision/FeatureClarification+FeatureSpec(类型预留)
WorkUnitBase/PlanningUnit(接口预留)/ExecutionUnit/createWave工厂
core 模块统一导出
WAVE_TRANSITIONS(附录A原样:9步+abort+replan bypass) + WaveAction类型 + guardWave(查表校验expectedStatuses) + nextWaveStatus(progressive+replan to=undefined原地) + isWaveTerminal + GuardVerdict类型
test-cases-non-empty/have-expected/necessity/sufficiency/alternatives/tradeoffs-present/risks-present 纯函数gate
commit-exists/tests-all-pass/test-references-design-review 纯函数gate（commit/tests结果由外部注入）
readability/architecture/overall-verdict非空 + followup-actions-when-needed gate
lessons-learned-non-empty + retrospect-covers-judgments gate
checkFreeze纯函数：replan改WavePlan时校验abandoned的WorkUnitItem不可删/改核心字段
computeImpact纯函数：输入WorkUnit树+废弃条目id→输出aborted/preserved/pendingRebuild。wave叶子影响面恒空但机制跑通
rules 模块统一导出
V1JsonFile schema(扁平workUnits集合+parentUnitId外键) + WorkUnitRecord + encodeCwd
V1Store类：JSON读写 + tmp+fsync+rename+lockfile(O_EXCL)+stale检测原子写 + 内存深拷贝snapshot回滚事务 + load/save/findChildren
store 模块统一导出
handleCreate：createWave工厂调用 + 初始化statusHistory首条 + save
handleClarify：progressive append clarifications + status流转 + save
handlePlan：写WavePlan条目(testCases/tasks/files/contracts) + status流转 + save
handleDesignReview：跑design-review gates + 写designReviewJudgment + status流转 + save
handleExecute：验commitHash(git cat-file注入) + 填WaveEvidence客观(commitHash/changedFiles) + status流转 + save
handleTest：注入测试结果 + 跑test gates + 填WaveEvidence.testRunResult + 写testJudgment + status流转 + save
handleExecReview：跑exec-review gates + 写execReviewJudgment + status流转 + save
handleRetrospect：跑retrospect gates + 写retrospectData + status流转 + save
handleCloseout：补evidence主观(summary/artifacts) + drift检查(文件存在) + 冻结frozenAt + status→closed + save
handleReplan：编排computeImpact + checkFreeze + append statusHistory(from=to) + 返回影响面给agent + save
handleAbort：级联abort子孙(wave叶子无子孙但机制跑通) + append abandonedRefs + status→aborted + save
handlers 模块统一导出 + V1Deps类型(store/git/testRunner/clock注入接口)
dispatch统一入口：loadWorkUnit(非create) → guardWave → handler路由 → ActionResult
v1对外类型：re-export core + handler params(V1Params联合) + ActionResult + V1Deps
包入口：导出dispatch + 全部公开类型
测试基建：createV1Env(mkdtemp独立CW_HOME) + makeWaveUnit + 阶段推进helper(setupToExecuted/setupToClosed等)
WAVE_TRANSITIONS主链9步流转 + guard拒绝跳步(illegal_transition) + progressive语义 + replan bypass(status不变append history) + 终态判定
每步gate pass+fail: design-review(7个gate)/test(3个gate)/exec-review(4个gate)/retrospect(2个gate)
checkFreeze: abandoned条目不可删/改核心字段 + active条目可改
computeImpact: wave叶子影响面恒空 + 废弃条目匹配逻辑
evidence跨阶段: execute填客观→test补testRunResult→closeout补主观+drift检查+冻结后不可改
V1Store: 原子写 + load/save往返 + findChildren + 事务回滚
通过dispatch跑完整wave生命周期: create→clarify→plan→design-review→execute→test→exec-review→retrospect→closeout
